hero_subtitle: A science-based approach to family harmony: diagnostics, personalised practices, and an AI consultant that understands you both.
features_subtitle: Oila AI brings together tools that help couples grow together
feat_diag_desc: Assess 10 key areas — from communication to trust. Get a clear picture of where you excel and what can be improved.
feat_ai_desc: Personalised advice based on your answers. Available 24/7 — ask a question any time and receive meaningful support.
feat_practice_desc: Daily exercises and Academy materials tailored to your couple's specific situation.
feat_index_desc: Track the dynamics of your couple's health over time. Seeing progress keeps you motivated to move forward.
trust_1: Privacy — your data belongs only to you
trust_3: Support in Russian, Uzbek and English
